seoTitle: Create a Landing Page in GoHighLevel: Step-by-Step
metaDescription: Build a professional, high-converting landing page in GoHighLevel without coding, from template selection to publishing and optimization.
intro: A well-built landing page can be the difference between a visitor bouncing away and a new lead captured, and GoHighLevel makes creating one straightforward without any coding. This tutorial covers picking a template, customizing your content, adding forms and buttons, and publishing your page ready for traffic.

steps.heading: Create a new landing page
steps.body: Start a new landing page in GoHighLevel and choose a template as your starting point.

steps.heading: Customize the design and content
steps.body: Edit sections, text, images, buttons, and branding so the page reflects your product, service, or campaign.

steps.heading: Add forms, buttons, and integrations
steps.body: Include lead capture forms and call-to-action buttons, and connect the page with your CRM contacts, calendars, and workflows.

steps.heading: Optimize for mobile devices
steps.body: Check how your landing page looks and functions on mobile to make sure it performs well across all screen sizes.

steps.heading: Publish and optimize the page
steps.body: Publish your landing page online and apply tips for improving conversions and lead generation once it's live.

faq.question: Do I need to know how to code to build a landing page in GoHighLevel?
faq.answer: No, the tutorial shows how to build professional landing pages without coding.

faq.question: Can I connect my landing page to email marketing and workflows?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial covers connecting your landing page with forms, calendars, workflows, CRM contacts, and email marketing.

faq.question: Will my landing page work well on mobile?
faq.answer: Yes, optimizing the page for mobile devices is one of the steps covered in the tutorial.

faq.question: How can I improve conversions on my landing page?
faq.answer: The tutorial includes tips to improve conversions and lead generation as part of the publishing and optimization step.

faq.question: Who is this tutorial for?
faq.answer: Agencies, marketers, business owners, freelancers, sales teams, and GoHighLevel beginners.
